channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: URC quarter-finals highlight home dominance and key challenges for South African sides
item.description: The United Rugby Championship quarter-finals produced a weekend full of dominant performances, clear tactical lessons, and a reminder of how crucial home advantage is in knockout rugby. Leinster and t...

item.title: Trump Mocks Carlson, Greene, Massie and Other Former Allies in AI-Generated Truth Social Post
item.description: President Donald Trump used Truth Social to share an AI-generated image mocking several prominent conservative figures who have recently criticized him or diverged from his positions. The image depict...

item.title: More than 25 PTI lawmakers absent from KP meeting amid reports of internal dissatisfaction
item.description: Signs of internal differences have surfaced within Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa after more than 25 lawmakers did not attend a key parliamentary party meeting held in Peshawar. ...

item.title: US and Iran exchange strikes amid ongoing ceasefire tensions and stalled negotiations
item.description: The United States reported that it carried out strikes on Iranian military installations over the weekend, marking a fresh escalation in the ongoing tensions between the two countries. According to US...

item.title: Iran Targets US Air Base After Weekend Strikes on Iranian Military Installations
item.description: The United States conducted strikes on Iranian military sites over the weekend, citing aggressive actions by Iran, including the downing of a US MQ-1 drone over international waters. In response, Iran...

item.title: UHN Gala Raises $2.3 Million to Support Research, Innovation and Patient Care in Toronto
item.description: The inaugural A Night Out for UHN gala, presented by Sprott Inc. and held at the Ritz-Carlton Toronto, raised $2.3 million in support of the University Health Network (UHN). The event brought together...

item.title: Sandiganbayan issues arrest warrant in plunder and graft cases against Jinggoy Estrada (live updates)
item.description: This news report covers live updates from the Sandiganbayan regarding the plunder and graft cases involving Senator Jinggoy Estrada. The anti-graft court has reportedly issued an arrest warrant in con...

item.title: ACT police appeal for help locating missing 15-year-old Hugo Nugent-Blanc
item.description: ACT Policing and the family of 15-year-old Hugo Nugent-Blanc have expressed deep concern for the teenager's welfare after he went missing from Watson, north Canberra, on Friday, May 15. Hugo, describe...

item.title: Debate grows over cycling safety laws in the UK amid rising accidents and e-bike concerns
item.description: Calls are increasing for the UK to consider introducing a 12mph speed limit for cyclists following a rise in cycling-related accidents and fatalities. The discussion has been influenced by measures in...

item.title: Party headquarters to finalise and announce candidates after primaries amid internal disputes
item.description: Candidates who took part in recent party primaries across Nigeria are still unsure of their final status as national party headquarters prepare to review and announce official results. Although primar...

item.title: Ramaphosa receives second interim report from Madlanga Commission investigating criminal justice system corruption
item.description: The Presidency has confirmed that President Cyril Ramaphosa has received the second interim report from the Commission of Inquiry into Criminality, Political Interference, and Corruption in South Afri...

item.title: Construction of Brisbane’s 2032 Olympic stadium begins amid protests over Victoria Park development
item.description: Construction has officially begun on the main stadium for the 2032 Olympic Games in Brisbane, following the removal of protestors from Victoria Park. The site, located near the city centre, was handed...

item.title: Faith Mangope: journalism rooted in adversity and a commitment to accountability
item.description: Faith Mangope, an acclaimed Metro FM broadcaster, credits her journey from poverty and hardship with shaping her fearless approach to journalism and her dedication to social equity. In an interview wi...

item.title: Saskatoon company launches fundraiser to support employees displaced by house fire
item.description: A Saskatoon business is rallying community support after two of its employees were affected by a house fire that caused significant damage and left them displaced. The company has organized a fundrais...

item.title: Sudbury lottery winner celebrates $2M prize and looks forward to sharing news with family
item.description: A Sudbury man is celebrating a life-changing lottery win of more than $2 million, expressing excitement and gratitude after discovering his newfound fortune. According to the report, the winner plans ...

item.title: DCI Arrests Missing Student in Connection with Utumishi Girls School Fire That Killed 16
item.description: In Gilgil, Nakuru County, a pre-dawn fire broke out at Utumishi Girls Senior Secondary School, tragically claiming the lives of 16 students who were asleep in their dormitory. The Directorate of Crimi...

item.title: Asian equities surge to record highs as AI optimism drives markets while oil prices rise on Middle East ceasefire uncertainty
item.description: Stock markets in Japan and South Korea reached fresh record highs on Monday, driven largely by strong investor enthusiasm surrounding artificial intelligence-related growth and solid corporate perform...

item.title: Elderly couple found fatally stabbed in Queens apartment; police continue investigation with no arrests
item.description: An elderly couple was found dead following a violent stabbing inside their apartment in the Fresh Meadows neighborhood of Queens, New York City, according to local reports. The victims, a 71-year-old ...

item.title: Alex Eala set to partner with Venus Williams in Bad Homburg Open doubles, report says
item.description: Filipina tennis player Alex Eala is reportedly set to join forces with American tennis icon Venus Williams for the upcoming Bad Homburg Open, according to a report by ABS-CBN News published on June 1,...

item.title: India becomes Australia’s largest source of migrants, signalling a major demographic and economic shift
item.description: The article discusses a significant demographic milestone in Australia, where India has, for the first time since records began, overtaken England as the country’s largest source of migrants. The shif...
